module.name: server
module.purpose: Server crate namespace for model, session, task, prompt, step, invocation, relay, and plan runtime subjects. Invocation and Relay are top-level server subjects while protocol shapes live in marix-protocol.

childModules.name: invocation
childModules.purpose: Owns the invocation module definitions including Invocation, clone, new, signature.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns the server model backend abstraction. backend.rs defines the public ModelBackend trait, the crate-internal ModelBackendImpl trait, and a blanket impl that delegates request directly to ModelBackendImpl::request; backend_deepseek.rs implements DeepseekBackend as a config-driven streaming Deepseek chat-completions backend over reqwest with SSE parsing and a user-role single-message payload that preserves request.prompt as content; error.rs defines ModelBackendError with From conversions for io, serde_json, and reqwest errors plus a Display impl. mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns server-side plan runtime orchestration and plan stringification over Invocation step kinds.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the server prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, InitialPrompt for initial planning, and AnalysisPrompt for model analysis of completed execution output using RequestBrief, ExecutionOutput, CurrentPlan, PendingIntentions, and Tools variables.

childModules.name: relay
childModules.purpose: Owns the relay module definitions including Relay, clone, new, signature.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns server session startup and routing boundaries for client, host, and task channels; implementation routing still awaits the new hierarchical event shape.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the server runtime Step type and re-exports top-level Invocation and Relay subjects for callers that still enter through the step namespace.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the task module definitions including TaskAccess, new, insert_invocation, insert_relay.
